zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III於1228年1月出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾時，他的父親Hughes de Chatillon-Saint-Pol I Comte de Saint-Pol and de Blois29歲，母親Marie D'Avesne18歲。他於1254年5月31日與Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant在義大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1289年3月12日在法國布列塔尼吉加普享年61歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯爾坎普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III于1228年1月出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾时，他的父亲Hughes de Chatillon-Saint-Pol I Comte de Saint-Pol and de Blois29岁，母亲Marie D'Avesne18岁。他于1254年5月31日与Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant在意大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里拿坡里结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1289年3月12日在法国布列塔尼吉加普享年61岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯爾坎普。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III was born in January 1228, in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Hughes de Chatillon-Saint-Pol I Comte de Saint-Pol and de Blois, was 29 and his mother, Marie D'Avesne, was 18. He married Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant on 31 May 1254, in Naples, Naples, Campania, Italy. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 12 March 1289, in Guingamp, Brittany, France, at the age of 61, and was buried in Cercamp, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III est né en janvier 1228, à Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Hughes de Chatillon-Saint-Pol I Comte de Saint-Pol and de Blois, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Marie D'Avesne, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant le 31 mai 1254, à Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 12 mars 1289, à Guingamp, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Cercamp, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III im Januar 1228 in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hughes de Chatillon-Saint-Pol I Comte de Saint-Pol and de Blois 29 und seine Mutter Marie D'Avesne 18. Er hat am 31. Mai 1254 in Neapel, Napoli, Campania, Italien Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. März 1289 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Guingamp, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Cercamp, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III è nato il nel gennaio 1228 nel Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Hughes de Chatillon-Saint-Pol I Comte de Saint-Pol and de Blois, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Marie D'Avesne, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant il 31 maggio 1254, nel Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 marzo 1289, nel Guingamp, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Cercamp, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol IIIが1228年1月にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-プオル-スル-テルノイゼで生まれた時，父Hughes de Chatillon-Saint-Pol I Comte de Saint-Pol and de Bloisは29歳，母Marie D'Avesneは18歳であった。1254年5月31日にイタリアカンプアニアナポリナポリでMatilda, countess of artois of Brabantと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1289年3月12日にフランスブレタグングインガンップで61歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスセルカンップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III(이)가 1228년 1월 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-포-수-터노이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hughes de Chatillon-Saint-Pol I Comte de Saint-Pol and de Blois(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie D'Avesne(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1254년 5월 31일 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리 나폴리에서 Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1289년 3월 12일 프랑스 브레타그니 길그가프에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 세르캠프에 묻혔다.

mn.January 1228–12 March 1289: 1228 оны Нэгдүгээр сар–1289 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 12

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III nasceu em janeiro de 1228, em Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Hughes de Chatillon-Saint-Pol I Comte de Saint-Pol and de Blois, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Marie D'Avesne, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant em 31 de maio de 1254, em Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de março de 1289, em Guingamp, Bretagne, França, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Cercamp, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III родился январь 1228 г. в местности сеинт-пол-сур-тирноис, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Hughes de Chatillon-Saint-Pol I Comte de Saint-Pol and de Blois было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie D'Avesne, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant 31 мая 1254 г. в местности наполи, наполи, кампаня, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 12 марта 1289 г. в местности гуингамп, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности киркамп, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy de Châtillon-Saint-Pol III nació en enero de 1228, en Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Hughes de Chatillon-Saint-Pol I Comte de Saint-Pol and de Blois, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Marie D'Avesne, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Matilda, countess of artois of Brabant el 31 de mayo de 1254, en Napoli, Napoli, Campania, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1289, en Guingamp, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Cercamp, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
